fixes.reason: T025 Abphyl2 dominant (ABPH2 GOF -> FEA4 partial reduction) still predicted decreased (ratio 0.85) because BA1 drops when FEA4 drops, collapsing AM. Hypothesis: remove FEA4 -> BA1 since ARF6/BIF2 are the primary direct regulators of BA1. Outcome: best-method accuracy unchanged (85.9%). Reverted.
fixes.biological_justification: FEA4 -> BA1 was based on ChIP-seq + differential-expression correlation (Pautler 2015); ARF6 and BIF2 are the canonical direct regulators (Gallavotti 2008, Skirpan 2009). Removal would not have violated biology, but the <0.5% accuracy gain threshold led to revert per the §8 keep/revert rule.

results.reason: Best-method unchanged at 85.9% Algebraic (+0.0% < 0.5% threshold). REVERT.
